_comment: Copy to scripts/notifier_config.json (gitignored) and fill in. MailWizz v2 auth = the single X-Api-Key header. base_url is the MailWizz API root (…/api/index.php).
_comment2: app_url (optional): public base URL of the app; used to deep-link a reviewer to their AI-review items. Omit to send the email without a link.
